decision: The platform ships every application repo with a 'hello-world' deployment pipeline, enough to prove it works end-to-end.
why: Without it, there is no way to verify that a freshly provisioned landing zone is wired correctly end-to-end

links.note: The getting-started modules live in the application repo
Examples use deployment stacks with deleteAll
Examples follow the same trigger/template separation
Examples use the same test-then-prod promotion

violations: getting-started modules tailored for a specific application requirements
